accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text across all three titles.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies all main purposes of the bill.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes COPPA amendment extending to teens and Title 31 amendment.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes covered platform exceptions including ISPs, email services, schools, and libraries.

effective_dates.why: Notes 18-month effective date for Title I and 1-year effective date for filter bubble provision.

major_provisions_covered.why: Thoroughly covers all three titles including duty of care, safeguards, transparency reports, COPPA extension, filter bubble, and reports elimination.

correct_entities.why: FTC, COPPA, and other entities correctly referenced.
